title: Senior UX Designer
details: Helped found a design systems team.
Designed and helped code accessible UI components, wrote UX guidelines, and created UI kits in Sketch and Figma.
Designed features for a data-heavy enterprise web application, such as a dashboard and account settings.

title: UX Designer
details: Created wireframes, mockups and prototypes for customer-facing websites and iOS and Android apps.
Implemented website designs using Bootstrap, HTML and CSS.
Conducted usability tests and a top task analysis.

title: UX Researcher
details: Coordinated participant recruitment, wrote test scripts, moderated usability tests, and wrote reports.
Created wireframes to clarify reccommendations
Worked for clients from various industries, such as banking, public transport, pension funds, and online classified ads.

details: Coordinated participant recruitment, wrote test scripts, moderated usability tests, and wrote reports.
Created wireframes to clarify reccommendations.

title: UX Design Intern
details: Evaluated a complex enterprise application through contextual inquiries, stakeholder interviews, and a heuristic evaluation.
Wrote report containing discovered UX issues, user group descriptions, and recommendations accompanied by mockups.

title: UX Research Intern
details: Recruited participants, wrote test scripts, moderated usability tests, analyzed test results, and wrote reports.
Created wireframes to clarify reccommendations
Worked on projects for clients such as PayPal, Microsoft, the Dutch government, ING Bank, and KLM Royal Dutch Airlines.
